name: Georgia Gibbs
abstract: Georgia Gibbs (born Frieda Lipschitz; August 17, 1919 – December 9, 2006) was an American popular singer and vocal entertainer rooted in jazz. Already singing publicly in her early teens, Gibbs achieved acclaim and notoriety in the mid-1950s copying songs originating with the black rhythm and blues community and later became a featured v…

about_quotes.speaker: Godfrey Hirsch
about_quotes.evidence: He finally changed her to by the name of Georgia Gibbs. Really? He changed her name to Georgia Gibbs. It was, I can't remember her.
